item.title: The Great Wealth Transfer: An existential test for advice
item.description: According to the 2026 Natixis Wealth Transfer Report, the biggest risk isn’t market risk – it’s relationship risk.
item.content:encoded: According to the 2026 Natixis Wealth Transfer Report, the biggest risk isn’t market risk – it’s relationship risk.

item.title: Model Portfolio Pulse: Growth resilient, risks rising

item.description: Read how energy shocks and macro crosscurrents are shaping growth, inflation, and rate expectations.
item.content:encoded: Read how energy shocks and macro crosscurrents are shaping growth, inflation, and rate expectations.

item.title: Tax trends and tactics Q1 2026: Tax season is open
item.description: It’s tax time. Early filers and investors should know how refunds, e filing and planning choices can matter. Get the details.
item.content:encoded: It’s tax time. Early filers and investors should know how refunds, e filing and planning choices can matter. Get the details.

item.title: Clearing up the misconception: ETF trade volume vs. liquidity
item.description: With growing investor interest in ETFs, our experts offer a quick primer on evaluating investment liquidity.
item.content:encoded: With growing investor interest in ETFs, our experts offer a quick primer on evaluating investment liquidity.

item.title: The quality factor: Why resilience matters
item.description: Quality investing has delivered consistent, risk adjusted returns. See how quality has performed over time.

item.title: US portfolio trends: Positioning after a risk-driven year
item.description: 2025 portfolios rewarded risk: Higher equity and international tilts outperformed as advisors moved closer to benchmarks.
item.content:encoded: 2025 portfolios rewarded risk: Higher equity and international tilts outperformed as advisors moved closer to benchmarks.

item.title: pAIn or gAIn? A road map for long-tailed investment cycles

item.content:encoded: Explore how AI investment cycles evolve from beta to differentiation and what it means for investors.

item.title: March Madness: Which fixed-income category wins it all?

item.content:encoded: Hear Jack Janasiewicz and Brian Hess discuss navigating markets shaped by policy, AI, and evolving market structure.

item.title: Mid caps are the new small caps
item.description: Mid caps gain importance as private equity expands and fewer small companies enter public markets.
item.content:encoded: Mid caps gain importance as private equity expands and fewer small companies enter public markets.

item.title: Model Portfolio Pulse: Outlook steady, equities favored
item.description: Growth remains constructive as inflation stays contained and Fed policy supports equities. See our model portfolio views.
item.content:encoded: Growth remains constructive as inflation stays contained and Fed policy supports equities. See our model portfolio views.

item.title: Prince of controversy: Markets question growth, inflation
item.description: Growth optimism fades as inflation cools, momentum unwinds, and investors rotate from crowded trades to fundamentals.
item.content:encoded: Growth optimism fades as inflation cools, momentum unwinds, and investors rotate from crowded trades to fundamentals.

item.title: Challenges to retirement security are prompting rare phenomenon
item.description: Why is retirement security so challenging today? Natixis hosted a February panel in Washington, DC, to explore solutions.
item.content:encoded: Why is retirement security so challenging today? Natixis hosted a February panel in Washington, DC, to explore solutions.

item.title: What history tells us about momentum
item.description: Momentum strategies outperformed in 2024–2025. Portfolio Manager Robert Beirig puts this in context and makes the case for more attractively valued equities.
item.content:encoded: Momentum strategies outperformed in 2024–2025. Portfolio Manager Robert Beirig puts this in context and makes the case for more attractively valued equities.

item.title: International equities: Why it’s not too late
item.description: Despite strong performance, international equities remain discounted, with improving fundamentals and quality on sale.
item.content:encoded: Despite strong performance, international equities remain discounted, with improving fundamentals and quality on sale.

item.description: Concerns about persistently high inflation are overstated as key drivers continue to ease into 2026.
